title: Comparative Analysis Based on DeepSeek, ChatGPT, and Google Gemini: Features, Techniques, Performance, Future Prospects
focus_areas: Comparative study of DeepSeek, ChatGPT, and Gemini
Future potential guidance for LLM-based AI research

techniques.description: Accurately selects only the most relevant parameters to be used during prediction, reducing computational expenses and boosting efficiency
Enhances conversational skills by generating context-aware and fluent responses
Merges text, images, and audio, enabling processing and production of outputs across different data types
